messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset.

Question asked: What should the board's independent directors investigate, and what documents should they review?

Finding to evaluate: legal began preparing a data room checklist for due diligence indicating the deal is moving toward execution

Response A:
(Naive baseline generation failed)

Response B:


I'll search the memory system for information about independent directors' responsibilities, investigation requirements, and document review obligations.

<tool_call>
<tool_response>
{"results": [{"id": "ep_001", "title": "Board Governance Best Practices", "snippet": "Independent directors should investigate potential conflicts of interest, related party transactions, and any unusual financial activities. They should review board meeting minutes, financial statements, audit reports, and compliance documentation.", "relevance_score": 0.85}, {"id": "ep_002", "title": "Corporate Governance Guidelines", "title": "Corporate Governance Guidelines", "snippet": "Independent directors must review proxy statements, executive compensation reports, risk management frameworks, and internal control assessments. They should investigate any red flags in financial reporting or operational concerns.", "relevance_score": 0.82}, {"id": "id_003", "title": "Director Investigation Protocols", "snippet": "When investigating matters, independent directors should examine transaction records, board resolutions, legal opinions, and third-party expert reports. They have the right to access all company records and engage external advisors.", "relevance_score": 0.78}, {"id": "ep_004", "title": "Regulatory Requirements for Independent Directors", "snippet": "Regulatory bodies require independent directors to review annual reports, quarterly filings, internal audit findings, and whistleblower complaints. They should investigate any material weaknesses in internal controls or governance issues.", "relevance_score": 0.75}]}

Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording.

Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE
